collections.name: Resy Staff Picks in New York
collections.description: If there’s one thing you must know about the people who work at Resy, it’s that we genuinely love restaurants. Here are our New York picks.

collections.name: New York’s Critically Acclaimed Restaurants
collections.description: The very deserving restaurants that have gotten awards, acclaims, or the critics’ stamp of approval.

collections.name: Where to Celebrate Lunar New Year
collections.description: Eat your way through the Lunar New Year and celebrate the Year of the Snake in style.

collections.name: New York’s Best Outdoor Dining
collections.description: Where to dine outside this season — from sunny sidewalk seating to secret backyard gardens.

collections.name: New York’s Essential Brunch Spots
collections.description: So that when it comes time for weekend brunch, you’re in good hands.

collections.name: Dining While (or With a) Vegan in New York
collections.description: Whether you’re seeking out plant-based dining or just want to have an incredible meal, period, here are the New York restaurants offering outstanding vegan dishes and menus.

collections.name: Save Room for Dessert in New York
collections.description: From full-blown pastry programs to signature sweets, these are the places where ordering dessert is a non-negotiable.

collections.name: Date Night Gems in New York
collections.description: From candlelit to casual, here are our favorite tables for two.

collections.name: Climbing
collections.description: You dine, the restaurant climbs. Climbing on Resy is the only data-driven list powered by your reservations. Consider it a curated guide by locals, for locals.

collections.name: Global Dining Access
collections.description: Global Dining Access by Resy gives eligible American Express® Card Members access to sought-after chefs and restaurants across the globe. To learn more, visit resy.com/globaldiningaccess.

content.body: Golden Diner isn’t your typical greasy spoon. Behind a counter lined with swivel stools, chef-owner Samuel Yoo whips up diner classics like you wouldn’t believe. He takes the BEC to new heights with a sesame scallion milk bun, studs club sandwich triangles with chicken katsu, and dishes out honey-butter pancakes that are a sight (and bite) to behold. Free coffee refills included.
content.name: why_we_like_it

about.body: Since opening in 2019, Golden Diner has won over the hearts of locals and visitors from all over the world, and received recognition from notable food critics and publications, such as the James Beard Foundation, New York Times, Food & Wine, NY Mag, Vogue, Eater, and The Infatuation. At our cozy and inviting restaurant, NY diner classics are reinvented through an Asian lens by Chef Sam Yoo. We are passionate about serving high-quality yet accessible dishes that intend to surprise and delight. Come on over to try some of our fan favorites like the Chicken Katsu Club, Thai Cobb Salad, and Honey Butter Pancakes! Thank you, we hope to cook for you soon :)

need_to_know.body:
- Reservations open up 30 days in advance at midnight EST!
- We accept walk ins during all hours! Just check in with the host for a wait time. 
- On weekend brunch our max party size is 6 people.
- If you are running late for your resy, we will hold your table for 10 minutes before offering the reservation to our waitlist.
- Due to our limited seating capacity, last minute changes to your party size may result in your reservation being cancelled. If you arrive with more, or less guests than booked for, you may lose your reservation and need to be added to the waitlist. 
- Cancelling your reservation less than 2 hours before your reservation time will result in a cancellation fee of $50 per guest.
- If you would like to make a reservation for a party of 9 or more, please email us at talkto@goldendinerny.com and we will get back to you asap!
need_to_know.title: Need to Know
